nodes.name: Lemlist Webhook
nodes.notes: Configura este webhook URL en Lemlist > Settings > Webhooks

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "title": "Respuesta Lemlist: {{$json.lead_name}}",
  "description": "El lead respondió al email de la campaña '{{$json.campaign_name}}'. Contactar en 24h.",
  "lead_id": "{{$json.lead_id}}",
  "type": "email",
  "priority": "high",
  "status": "pending"
}

meta.description: Webhook de Lemlist: recibe eventos (sent/opened/clicked/replied/bounced), busca lead en CRM, actualiza score, crea acción de follow-up si responde
